title: microtis gracilis
intro: Microtis gracilis, also known as the slender onion orchid or grass orchid, is a plant species that belongs to the orchid family and is native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Microtis gracilis include its potential to help with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by drying the plant's roots and leaves.
